---
title: Lattice Boltzmann Method
date: 2/18/26
author:
  - name: Alex Kiefer
    id: akiefer3
    orcid: 0000-0002-5398-8740
    email: akiefer3@vols.utk.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: University of Tennessee, Knoxville
        city: Knoxville
        state: TN
        url: www.utk.edu
keep-intermediates: false
format: 
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: tectonic
    code-overflow: wrap
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fvextra}
          \fvset{breaklines=true, breakanywhere=true}
    include-before-body:
      - text: |
          \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{verbatim}{Verbatim}{breaklines,breakanywhere}
---
